issues.claim: Verse supports chapter 7 thesis at appropriate thread
issues.objection: 7.27 sits in thread 3 (dualities-from-desire-and-aversion; STRONG operational analog) of the chapter-7 thesis; the engineering layer remains anchored to that thread. Chapter 7's voice (declarative-revelatory; senior-revealing) is honored. STRETCHED tagging is honest where the verse's metaphysical reach exceeds the operational analog (per thesis: 7.21-7.26 and 7.29-7.30 expected to run STRETCHED; 7.27-7.28 STRONG). This verse is sharp and operationally robust (per chapter-7 thesis: STRONG operational analog).

notes: 7.27 supports the chapter-7 thesis: thread 3 (dualities-from-desire-and-aversion; STRONG operational analog). Verse-ordering coherence: progressive build-up from faith-firm doctrine (7.21-7.22) → bounded-fruit (7.23) → metaphysical concealment (7.24-7.26) → dualities-and-meritorious-cross (7.27-7.28) → knowing-at-departure (7.29-7.30) honored. PASS.
